requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — SIRIM Certification, IEC 62619, and IEC 62133 for Malaysia BESS
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——马来西亚BESS的SIRIM认证、IEC 62619及IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——馬來西亞BESS的SIRIM認證、IEC 62619及IEC 62133

summary.en: SIRIM Berhad is Malaysia's national standards body and a government-linked company that provides product testing and certification services for the Malaysian market. SIRIM operates the SIRIM Certification Scheme for electrical and electronic products; a SIRIM certification mark indicates compliance with the applicable Malaysian Standard (MS) or adopted international standard. For lithium batteries and BESS, SIRIM and Suruhanjaya Tenaga (ST) may require evidence of compliance with IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) for industrial/utility-scale BESS cells and modules, and IEC 62133 (Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries) for smaller cells. IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for Electrochemical-based Energy Storage Systems) may be required at the system level. Malaysia does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product certification regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation. The practical expectation for utility-scale BESS projects tendered by TNB is IEC 62619 compliance evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory. Exporters should verify the current SIRIM and ST regulated-product scope for BESS before shipment, as Malaysia's BESS regulatory framework is evolving.
summary.zh: 马来西亚标准局（SIRIM Berhad）是马来西亚国家标准机构和政府关联公司，为马来西亚市场提供产品测试和认证服务。SIRIM运营面向电气电子产品的SIRIM认证计划；SIRIM认证标志表明符合适用的马来西亚标准（MS）或采用的国际标准。对于锂电池和BESS，SIRIM和能源委员会（ST）可能要求提供工业/公用事业规模BESS电芯和模组符合IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）的证据，以及小型电芯符合IEC 62133（便携式密封二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）的证据。系统层面可能要求符合IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统安全要求）。马来西亚目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品认证法规，与欧盟《电池法规》相当。TNB招标公用事业规模BESS项目的实际预期是来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62619合规证据。出口商在出货前应核实SIRIM和ST当前对BESS的受监管产品范围，因马来西亚BESS监管框架仍在演变中。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞標準局（SIRIM Berhad）是馬來西亞國家標準機構和政府關聯公司，為馬來西亞市場提供產品測試和認證服務。SIRIM運營面向電氣電子產品的SIRIM認證計劃；SIRIM認證標誌表明符合適用的馬來西亞標準（MS）或採用的國際標準。對於鋰電池和BESS，SIRIM和能源委員會（ST）可能要求提供工業/公用事業規模BESS電芯和模組符合IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）的證據，以及小型電芯符合IEC 62133（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）的證據。系統層面可能要求符合IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統安全要求）。馬來西亞目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品認證法規，與歐盟《電池法規》相當。TNB招標公用事業規模BESS項目的實際預期是來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62619合規證據。出口商在出貨前應核實SIRIM和ST當前對BESS的受監管產品範圍，因馬來西亞BESS監管框架仍在演變中。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety; expected in Malaysia utility-scale project specifications)
IEC 62133-2:2017 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries (applicable to smaller lithium cells; SIRIM certification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
IEC 62040-1 — Uninterruptible Power Systems — General and Safety Requirements (referenced for BESS power conversion systems in some project specifications)
SIRIM Berhad — Malaysia national standards body and certification authority; verify current regulated-product list and applicable MS or IEC standard adoption for BESS before shipment
Suruhanjaya Tenaga (ST) — verify any ST-specific BESS equipment certification requirements

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 or IEC 62133 in Malaysia project specifications or SIRIM certification. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被马来西亚项目规格或SIRIM认证接受为IEC 62619或IEC 62133的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被馬來西亞項目規格或SIRIM認證接受為IEC 62619或IEC 62133的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Malaysia project owners, TNB tenders, and SIRIM certification reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in Malaysia project technical specifications or SIRIM certification. Exporters should: (a) verify the current SIRIM regulated-product list and any ST equipment certification requirements for BESS before shipment; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Malaysia BESS projects; (c) confirm whether IEC 62133 or IEC 62133-2 is also required for the specific cell form factor and chemistry; (d) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-2 editions referenced in the project specification or TNB tender requirements before committing to a test programme; (e) note that Malaysia's BESS regulatory framework is evolving — additional mandatory certification requirements may be introduced.
gap.zh: 关键差距：马来西亚项目业主、TNB招标和SIRIM认证将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被马来西亚项目技术规格或SIRIM认证接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）出货前核实SIRIM受监管产品清单和ST对BESS的任何设备认证要求；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至马来西亚BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）确认特定电芯形态和化学体系是否还须符合IEC 62133或IEC 62133-2；（d）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格或TNB招标要求中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2版本；（e）注意马来西亚BESS监管框架仍在演变——可能引入额外的强制认证要求。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：馬來西亞項目業主、TNB招標和SIRIM認證將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被馬來西亞項目技術規格或SIRIM認證接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）出貨前核實SIRIM受監管產品清單和ST對BESS的任何設備認證要求；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至馬來西亞BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）確認特定電芯形態和化學體系是否還須符合IEC 62133或IEC 62133-2；（d）在啟動測試計劃前確認項目規格或TNB招標要求中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2版本；（e）注意馬來西亞BESS監管框架仍在演變——可能引入額外的強制認證要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where TNB tenders or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; SIRIM mandatory certification scope for BESS has not been fully confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with SIRIM and ST
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

source.publisher: SIRIM Berhad (Standards and Industrial Research Institute of Malaysia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product certification regulation has been identified for Malaysia as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Malaysia project specifications and TNB tenders. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Malaysia project acceptance or SIRIM certification. Verify SIRIM current regulated-product scope and ST requirements, and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, TNB, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment. Malaysia's BESS regulatory framework is evolving — allow additional lead time for certification if regulatory changes occur.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，马来西亚尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品认证法规；然而，IEC 62619是马来西亚项目规格和TNB招标中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足马来西亚项目验收或SIRIM认证要求。出货前请核实SIRIM现行受监管产品范围和ST要求，并向项目业主、TNB及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619证据要求。马来西亚BESS监管框架仍在演变——如发生法规变更，请为认证预留额外时间。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，馬來西亞尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品認證法規；然而，IEC 62619是馬來西亞項目規格和TNB招標中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足馬來西亞項目驗收或SIRIM認證要求。出貨前請核實SIRIM現行受監管產品範圍和ST要求，並向項目業主、TNB及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619證據要求。馬來西亞BESS監管框架仍在演變——如發生法規變更，請為認證預留額外時間。
